mapper.insert: INSERT /* InvtrDaySumMapper.createTodayInvtrDayMst */ INTO LGS_INVTR_DAY_MST ( ORGN_ID /* 조직ID */ , STD_DT /* 기준일자 */ , PRDT_ID /* 제품ID */ , OLD_YN /* 중고여부 */ , GOOD_STRG_INVTR_QNTY /* 양품창고재고수량 */ , NG_STRG_INVTR_QNTY /* 불량창고재고수량 */ , IN_DUE_QNTY /* 입고예정수량 */ , OUT_RSV_QNTY /* 출고예약수량 */ , REGST_ID /* 등록자ID */ , REG_DTTM /* 등록일시 */ ) SELECT INV.ORGN_ID , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') , INV.PRDT_ID , INV.OLD_YN , INV.GOOD_STRG_INVTR_QNTY , INV.NG_STRG_INVTR_QNTY , INV.IN_DUE_QNTY , INV.OUT_RSV_QNTY , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE FROM LGS_INVTR_DAY_MST INV , CMN_INTM_MDL MDL , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST ORG WHERE INV.PRDT_ID = MDL.PRDT_ID AND MDL.PRDT_TYPE_CD = '01' AND INV.ORGN_ID = ORG.ORGN_ID AND ORG.TYPE_CD = '20' AND ( INV.GOOD_STRG_INVTR_QNTY + INV.NG_STRG_INVTR_QNTY + INV.IN_DUE_QNTY + INV.OUT_RSV_QNTY ) > 0 AND INV.STD_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') UNION SELECT INV.ORGN_ID , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') , INV.PRDT_ID , INV.OLD_YN , INV.GOOD_STRG_INVTR_QNTY , INV.NG_STRG_INVTR_QNTY , INV.IN_DUE_QNTY , INV.OUT_RSV_QNTY , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE FROM LGS_INVTR_DAY_MST INV , CMN_INTM_MDL MDL , CMN_GRP_CD_MST GRP WHERE INV.PRDT_ID = MDL.PRDT_ID AND INV.ORGN_ID = GRP.CD_VAL AND GRP.GRP_ID = 'LGS4005' AND ( INV.GOOD_STRG_INVTR_QNTY + INV.NG_STRG_INVTR_QNTY + INV.IN_DUE_QNTY + INV.OUT_RSV_QNTY ) > 0 AND INV.STD_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD')
